title: mouthwatering american falafel burger
description: roasted, chewy, show-off american dish featuring crispy falafel patties, melted cheese, and sweet caramelized onions all sandwiched between a toasted brioche bun.

ingredients.name: falafel patties
ingredients.notes: homemade or store-bought, about 1-inch in diameter

ingredients.name: candy pieces
ingredients.notes: such as caramel or peanut butter cups

instructions: preheat oven to 400f. toast the brioche bun on a griddle or in the oven for 2 minutes.
form the falafel patties and roast in the oven for 12 minutes, or until crispy.
while the falafel is roasting, caramelize the onions in a pan with a tablespoon of oil over medium heat for 15 minutes.
assemble the burger by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a falafel patty, a slice of cheese, a spoonful of caramelized onions, a few slices of tomato, and finally the top bun.
Repeat the assembly process for the remaining three burgers.
Serve each burger with a side of ketchup, lettuce, and a sprinkle of candy pieces.
